productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Casual Grey Shoes
description: Designed for those who never compromise on comfort, this casual suede shoe from united colors of benetton is packed with features to offer you a stable and comfortable ride.UpperSuede upper with contrast coloured overlays for styleMildly padded tongue and collar, with a fabric inner lining for comfortLacing system for a custom FitPadded footbed for all-day comfortMidsoleEVA midsole for impact protectionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with herringbone grooves for absolute grip and tractionSandal careClean upper using a suede brushDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
